en: Now when the wall had been built and I had set up the doors, and the gatekeepers, the singers, and the Levites had been appointed,
zh: 城牆建成後，我就裝上門扇，委派了守門的、歌唱者和利未人，

en: I gave my brother Hanani and Hananiah the governor of the castle charge over Jerusalem, for he was a more faithful and God-fearing man than many.
zh: 我委任我的兄弟哈拿尼和營樓長哈拿尼雅，管理耶路撒冷，因為哈拿尼雅是個可信靠的人，敬畏 神勝過許多人。

en: And I said to them, "Let not the gates of Jerusalem be opened until the sun is hot. And while they are still standing guard, let them shut and bar the doors. Appoint guards from among the inhabitants of Jerusalem, some at their guard posts and some in front of their own homes."
zh: 我吩咐他們說：“日上中天時，耶路撒冷的城門也不可長久敞開；太陽還停著未落，守門的人站崗的時候，也要關好門、上好閂，要派耶路撒冷的居民站崗，一些人在哨崗，另一些人在自己的屋前瞭望。”

en: The city was wide and large, but the people within it were few, and no houses had been rebuilt.
zh: 城既寬闊又廣大，但城中的居民稀少；房屋還沒有建造起來。

en: Then my God put it into my heart to assemble the nobles and the officials and the people to be enrolled by genealogy. And I found the book of the genealogy of those who came up at the first, and I found written in it:
zh: 我的 神使我的心定意，召集貴族、官長和人民，要照家譜登記。我找到頭一次上來的人的家譜，我找到的家譜上面寫著：

en: These were the people of the province who came up out of the captivity of those exiles whom Nebuchadnezzar the king of Babylon had carried into exile. They returned to Jerusalem and Judah, each to his town.
zh: 以下這些猶大省的人，從前巴比倫王尼布甲尼撒擄走他們，現在他們從被擄之地歸回耶路撒冷和猶大，各人回到自己的城鎮。

en: They came with Zerubbabel, Jeshua, Nehemiah, Azariah, Raamiah, Nahamani, Mordecai, Bilshan, Mispereth, Bigvai, Nehum, Baanah. The number of the men of the people of Israel:
zh: 他們是跟所羅巴伯、耶書亞、尼希米、亞撒利雅、拉米、拿哈瑪尼、末底改、必珊、米斯毘列、比革瓦伊、尼宏和巴拿一同回來的。 回歸的平民 以色列民的人數記在下面：

en: the sons of Parosh, 2,172.
zh: 巴錄的子孫二千一百七十二人。

en: The sons of Shephatiah, 372.
zh: 示法提雅的子孫三百七十二人。

en: The sons of Arah, 652.
zh: 亞拉的子孫六百五十二人。

en: The sons of Pahath-moab, namely the sons of Jeshua and Joab, 2,818.
zh: 巴哈．摩押的子孫，就是耶書亞和約押的子孫，二千八百一十八人。

en: The sons of Elam, 1,254.
zh: 以攔的子孫一千二百五十四人。

en: The sons of Zattu, 845.
zh: 薩土的子孫八百四十五人。

en: The sons of Zaccai, 760.
zh: 薩改的子孫七百六十人。

en: The sons of Binnui, 648.
zh: 賓內的子孫六百四十八人。

en: The sons of Bebai, 628.
zh: 比拜的子孫六百二十八人。

en: The sons of Azgad, 2,322.
zh: 押甲的子孫二千三百二十二人。

en: The sons of Adonikam, 667.
zh: 亞多尼干的子孫六百六十七人。

en: The sons of Bigvai, 2,067.
zh: 比革瓦伊的子孫二千零六十七人。

en: The sons of Adin, 655.
zh: 亞丁的子孫六百五十五人。

en: The sons of Ater, namely of Hezekiah, 98.
zh: 亞特的子孫，就是希西家的子孫，九十八人。

en: The sons of Hashum, 328.
zh: 哈順的子孫三百二十八人。

en: The sons of Bezai, 324.
zh: 比宰的子孫三百二十四人。

en: The sons of Hariph, 112.
zh: 哈拉的子孫一百一十二人。

en: The sons of Gibeon, 95.
zh: 基遍的子孫九十五人。

en: The men of Bethlehem and Netophah, 188.
zh: 伯利恆人和尼陀法人，共一百八十八人。

en: The men of Anathoth, 128.
zh: 亞拿突人一百二十八人。

en: The men of Beth-azmaveth, 42.
zh: 伯．亞斯瑪弗人四十二人。

en: The men of Kiriath-jearim, Chephirah, and Beeroth, 743.
zh: 基列．耶琳人、基非拉人和比錄人，共七百四十三人。

en: The men of Ramah and Geba, 621.
zh: 拉瑪人和迦巴人，共六百二十一人。

en: The men of Michmas, 122.
zh: 默瑪人一百二十二人。

en: The men of Bethel and Ai, 123.
zh: 伯特利人和艾人，共一百二十三人。

en: The men of the other Nebo, 52.
zh: 另一個尼波的人五十二人。

en: The sons of the other Elam, 1,254.
zh: 另一個以攔的子孫一千二百五十四人。

en: The sons of Harim, 320.
zh: 哈琳的子孫三百二十人。

en: The sons of Jericho, 345.
zh: 耶利哥的子孫三百四十五人。

en: The sons of Lod, Hadid, and Ono, 721.
zh: 羅得、哈第和阿挪的子孫共七百二十一人。

en: The sons of Senaah, 3,930.
zh: 西拿的子孫三千九百三十人。

en: The priests: the sons of Jedaiah, namely the house of Jeshua, 973.
zh: 祭司的數目記在下面：耶書亞家的耶大雅的子孫九百七十三人。

en: The sons of Immer, 1,052.
zh: 音麥的子孫一千零五十二人。

en: The sons of Pashhur, 1,247.
zh: 巴施戶珥的子孫一千二百四十七人。

en: The sons of Harim, 1,017.
zh: 哈琳的子孫一千零一十七人。

en: The Levites: the sons of Jeshua, namely of Kadmiel of the sons of Hodevah, 74.
zh: 利未人的數目記在下面：何達威的子孫，就是耶書亞和甲篾的子孫，七十四人。

en: The singers: the sons of Asaph, 148.
zh: 負責歌唱的：亞薩的子孫一百四十八人。

en: The gatekeepers: the sons of Shallum, the sons of Ater, the sons of Talmon, the sons of Akkub, the sons of Hatita, the sons of Shobai, 138.
zh: 守門的人數：沙龍的子孫、亞特的子孫、達們的子孫、亞谷的子孫、哈底大的子孫和朔拜的子孫，共一百三十八人。

en: The temple servants: the sons of Ziha, the sons of Hasupha, the sons of Tabbaoth,
zh: 殿役的數目記在下面：西哈的子孫、哈蘇巴的子孫、答巴俄的子孫、

en: the sons of Keros, the sons of Sia, the sons of Padon,
zh: 基綠的子孫、西亞的子孫、巴頓的子孫、

en: the sons of Lebana, the sons of Hagaba, the sons of Shalmai,
zh: 利巴拿的子孫、哈迦巴的子孫、薩買的子孫、

en: the sons of Hanan, the sons of Giddel, the sons of Gahar,
zh: 哈難的子孫、吉德的子孫、迦哈的子孫、

en: the sons of Reaiah, the sons of Rezin, the sons of Nekoda,
zh: 利亞雅的子孫、利汛的子孫、尼哥大的子孫、

en: the sons of Gazzam, the sons of Uzza, the sons of Paseah,
zh: 迦散的子孫、烏撒的子孫、巴西亞的子孫、

en: the sons of Besai, the sons of Meunim, the sons of Nephushesim,
zh: 比塞的子孫、米烏寧的子孫、尼普心的子孫、

en: the sons of Bakbuk, the sons of Hakupha, the sons of Harhur,
zh: 巴卜的子孫、哈古巴的子孫、哈忽的子孫、

en: the sons of Bazlith, the sons of Mehida, the sons of Harsha,
zh: 巴洗律的子孫、米希大的子孫、哈沙的子孫、

en: the sons of Barkos, the sons of Sisera, the sons of Temah,
zh: 巴柯的子孫、西西拉的子孫、答瑪的子孫、

en: the sons of Neziah, the sons of Hatipha.
zh: 尼細亞的子孫和哈提法的子孫。

en: The sons of Solomon's servants: the sons of Sotai, the sons of Sophereth, the sons of Perida,
zh: 所羅門僕人的子孫的數目記在下面：瑣太的子孫、瑣斐列的子孫、比路大的子孫、

en: the sons of Jaala, the sons of Darkon, the sons of Giddel,
zh: 雅拉的子孫、達昆的子孫、吉德的子孫、

en: the sons of Shephatiah, the sons of Hattil, the sons of Pochereth-hazzebaim, the sons of Amon.
zh: 示法提雅的子孫、哈替的子孫、玻黑列．哈斯巴音的子孫和亞們的子孫。

en: All the temple servants and the sons of Solomon's servants were 392.
zh: 作殿役的和所羅門僕人的子孫共三百九十二人。

en: The following were those who came up from Tel-melah, Tel-harsha, Cherub, Addon, and Immer, but they could not prove their fathers' houses nor their descent, whether they belonged to Israel:
zh: 以下這些人是從特米拉、特哈薩、基綠、亞頓和音麥上來的，可是他們無法證明他們的父家或世系是以色列人。

en: the sons of Delaiah, the sons of Tobiah, the sons of Nekoda, 642.
zh: 這些人是第萊雅的子孫、多比雅的子孫和尼哥大的子孫，共六百四十二人。

en: Also, of the priests: the sons of Hobaiah, the sons of Hakkoz, the sons of Barzillai (who had taken a wife of the daughters of Barzillai the Gileadite and was called by their name).
zh: 祭司中，有哈巴雅的子孫、哈哥斯的子孫和巴西萊的子孫；巴西萊娶了基列人巴西萊的一個女兒為妻，所以起名叫巴西萊。

en: These sought their registration among those enrolled in the genealogies, but it was not found there, so they were excluded from the priesthood as unclean.
zh: 這些人查考族譜的記錄，卻找不著，因此他們算為不潔淨，不能作祭司。

en: The governor told them that they were not to partake of the most holy food until a priest with Urim and Thummim should arise.
zh: 省長告訴他們不可吃至聖之物，直等到有能用烏陵和土明來決疑的祭司興起來。

en: The whole assembly together was 42,360,
zh: 全體會眾共有四萬二千三百六十人。

en: besides their male and female servants, of whom there were 7,337. And they had 245 singers, male and female.
zh: 此外，還有他們的僕婢七千三百三十七人；又有男女歌唱者二百四十五人。

en: Their horses were 736, their mules 245,
zh: 他們有馬七百三十六匹，騾子二百四十五匹 ，

en: their camels 435, and their donkeys 6,720.
zh: 駱駝四百三十五匹和驢子六千七百二十頭。

en: Now some of the heads of fathers' houses gave to the work. The governor gave to the treasury 1,000 darics of gold, 50 basins, 30 priests' garments and 500 minas of silver.
zh: 有些族長為了這工程而捐獻；省長捐給庫房金子八公斤、碗五十個和祭司的禮服五百三十件；

en: And some of the heads of fathers' houses gave into the treasury of the work 20,000 darics of gold and 2,200 minas of silver.
zh: 族長捐給這工程的庫房金子一百六十八公斤、銀子一千二百五十公斤。

en: And what the rest of the people gave was 20,000 darics of gold, 2,000 minas of silver, and 67 priests' garments.
zh: 其餘的人民捐獻金子一百六十八公斤，銀子一千一百四十公斤、祭司的禮服六十七件。

en: So the priests, the Levites, the gatekeepers, the singers, some of the people, the temple servants, and all Israel, lived in their towns. And when the seventh month had come, the people of Israel were in their towns.
zh: 於是祭司、利未人、守門的、歌唱者、一部分人民、作殿役的，和以色列眾人都住在自己的城裡。
